requirement_topic.en: Grid-tied PV inverter safety certification — ABNT NBR IEC 62109 under INMETRO scheme
requirement_topic.zh: 并网光伏逆变器安全认证——INMETRO框架下的ABNT NBR IEC 62109
requirement_topic.zht: 並網光伏逆變器安全認證——INMETRO框架下的ABNT NBR IEC 62109

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters sold in Brazil must obtain INMETRO certification based on ABNT NBR IEC 62109-1 (general safety requirements) and ABNT NBR IEC 62109-2 (inverter-specific requirements), which are the Brazilian adoptions of IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2. [UNVERIFIED: mandatory enforcement date and exact INMETRO portaria number — verify at gov.br/inmetro]
summary.zh: 在巴西销售的并网光伏逆变器须依据ABNT NBR IEC 62109-1（通用安全要求）及ABNT NBR IEC 62109-2（逆变器专项要求）取得INMETRO认证，该两项标准为IEC 62109-1及62109-2的巴西转化版本。[未经核实：强制执行日期及具体INMETRO部令编号——请于gov.br/inmetro核实]
summary.zht: 在巴西銷售的並網光伏逆變器須依據ABNT NBR IEC 62109-1（通用安全要求）及ABNT NBR IEC 62109-2（逆變器專項要求）取得INMETRO認證，該兩項標準為IEC 62109-1及62109-2的巴西轉化版本。[未經核實：強制執行日期及具體INMETRO部令編號——請於gov.br/inmetro核實]

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR IEC 62109-1 [UNVERIFIED exact edition year]
ABNT NBR IEC 62109-2 [UNVERIFIED exact edition year]

summary.en: Chinese PV inverters are typically certified to GB/T 37408 (technical requirements for PV inverters) and may hold an IEC 62109-1/-2 CB report via the IECEE CB Scheme. The CB report can support market access in multiple countries but does NOT substitute for Brazilian INMETRO certification — a separate in-country evaluation or recognised local body is required.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器通常依据GB/T 37408（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）取得认证，并可通过IECEE CB体系取得IEC 62109-1/-2的CB测试报告。CB报告可支持多国市场准入，但不能替代巴西INMETRO认证——仍需经过独立的本地认证评估或经认可的本地认证机构审核。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器通常依據GB/T 37408（光伏並網逆變器技術規範）取得認證，並可透過IECEE CB體系取得IEC 62109-1/-2的CB測試報告。CB報告可支持多國市場準入，但不能替代巴西INMETRO認證——仍需經過獨立的本地認證評估或經認可的本地認證機構審核。

gap.en: A CB report to IEC 62109-1/-2 from a Chinese lab is necessary but not sufficient for Brazil. The product must undergo INMETRO certification through an INMETRO-accredited OCP (Organismo de Certificação de Produto). Test data from a CB report may be leveraged to reduce retesting, but the INMETRO certificate itself must be issued by a recognised Brazilian or INMETRO-accepted body. [UNVERIFIED: current list of INMETRO-accepted foreign labs — verify at gov.br/inmetro]
gap.zh: 中国实验室出具的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB报告是进入巴西市场的必要但不充分条件。产品须通过INMETRO认可的产品认证机构（OCP）完成INMETRO认证。CB报告数据可用于减少重复测试，但INMETRO证书本身须由经认可的巴西或INMETRO接受的机构颁发。[未经核实：INMETRO目前接受的境外实验室名单——请于gov.br/inmetro核实]
gap.zht: 中國實驗室出具的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB報告是進入巴西市場的必要但不充分條件。產品須通過INMETRO認可的產品認證機構（OCP）完成INMETRO認證。CB報告數據可用於減少重複測試，但INMETRO證書本身須由經認可的巴西或INMETRO接受的機構頒發。[未經核實：INMETRO目前接受的境外實驗室名單——請於gov.br/inmetro核實]

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory [UNVERIFIED: confirm current enforcement status at gov.br/inmetro]
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB/T 37408 via CQC or equivalent; IEC 62109 CB optional but widely held)

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. A Chinese inverter holding GB/T 37408 and IEC 62109 CB certification will likely need to undergo a separate INMETRO certification process before it can be legally sold in Brazil. The CB report may reduce retesting burden but does not replace the INMETRO certificate. Verify current portaria requirements and accepted certification bodies at gov.br/inmetro before making compliance decisions.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。持有GB/T 37408及IEC 62109 CB认证的中国逆变器，在巴西合法销售前仍需完成独立的INMETRO认证流程。CB报告可减少重复测试负担，但不能替代INMETRO证书。在作出合规决策前，请于gov.br/inmetro核实当前部令要求及认可认证机构的最新信息。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。持有GB/T 37408及IEC 62109 CB認證的中國逆變器，在巴西合法銷售前仍需完成獨立的INMETRO認證流程。CB報告可減少重複測試負擔，但不能替代INMETRO證書。在作出合規決策前，請於gov.br/inmetro核實當前部令要求及認可認證機構的最新資訊。
